summary: Phase 5 backend + frontend tested. Backend 10/10 pytest PASS in test_phase5.py: GET /api/dashboard/me aggregated payload (organizer+plan+stats+upcoming+microsite+funnel+features), GET /api/plans/me/features (_plan_code=profesional, numbered_seating=true, max_events=-1, manual_payments=true), POST /api/events/me with default payment_methods/discounts/access_params, PUT updates transfer/cash/presale/access fields with GET-verified persistence, gallery upload+delete+reorder (422 on invalid index/duplicates, 10-image cap enforced), seed events have Phase 5 fields, Phase 4 free-order regression OK. Frontend visual checks: login→/app/dashboard, plan badge 'Profesional', 4 stat cards, 5-item sidebar, /app/venues empty-state with disabled create btn, EventWizard with 7 tabs (tab-general...tab-access), /app/configuracion 3 tabs, all 4 legacy redirects (/dashboard, /eventos, /microsite/editor, /configuracion → /app/*), public event /o/demo-org/e/concierto-acustico-demo renders with Comprar entradas button.
critical_code_review_comments: SOLID: dashboard.py aggregates organizer + plan + month-financials + upcoming top-5 + microsite + funnel + features in a single endpoint, projecting _id:0 everywhere. Uses Mongo aggregate for revenue (good).
SOLID: plan_features.PLAN_OVERRIDES correctly overrides numbered_seating=true and max_events=-1 for 'profesional'; _plan_code echoed back to UI for conditional rendering.
SOLID: GalleryReorderBody validates order via `sorted(order) != range(len)` — single check rejects both duplicates and out-of-range indices (422 verified for both [0,1,5] and [0,0,1]).

SOLID: create_my_event applies default PaymentMethodConfig/EventDiscounts/EventAccessParams when payload omits them (model_dump fallback). Seeded events have all 3 fields populated (verified via public/events).
SOLID: Frontend legacy redirects use <Navigate replace> + RedirectEvent/RedirectEventEdit preserve :event_id params. All 4 redirects work.
OBSERVATION: ENV=development is on in preview, so /api/_dev/* endpoints remain reachable. Confirmed not a regression — Phase 4 simulator still required since Stripe webhooks don't reach preview.
OBSERVATION: /api/events/me/{id}/gallery upload max-size is 5MB and ALLOWED_IMG_MIME is {jpeg,png,webp,heic,heif}. No GIF/SVG. Acceptable.

MINOR (test-only, not a bug): Event title input in wizard has no name='title' attribute and the placeholder is 'Ej: Concierto Acústico'. Adding data-testid='event-title-input' to the input would make Playwright tests more robust (matches the convention used elsewhere).

success_rate.frontend: 100% on critical paths (login, dashboard, sidebar, venues placeholder, wizard tabs, configuracion tabs, redirects, public event regression). Only failure was a Playwright selector mismatch on the wizard title input — wizard itself renders correctly.

seed_data_creation: Tests create one ephemeral event 'TEST_Fase5 Event' (draft, kept in DB) with up to 10 gallery images (small PNG bytes stored under /app/backend/event_assets/). One ephemeral free order TYS-0000XX for charla-liderazgo-femenino. No cleanup performed; safe — none affect counters/seed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Regression suite now: test_phase1.py + test_phase2.py + test_phase4.py + test_phase5.py. Phase 5b (manual-payment selector in PurchaseModal) is intentionally NOT implemented — the toggles transfer/cash on events are persisted only. Plan features are read-only architecture (no enforcement). Wizard title input lacks a data-testid; add `data-testid='event-title-input'` if writing wizard end-to-end tests. Note the long-standing gotcha: backend security._extract_token reads cookie before Authorization header — use a fresh requests.Session() per user in pytest (already applied in conftest pattern of test_phase5.py via _fresh_session()).
rca of the issue: N/A — no product bugs found in Phase 5.
